data.value: 現在のステップサイズ

data.value: プロセステンプレート:

data.value: No service requires configuring a cache path.

data.name: ConfigureMqttConnection_DefaultsToLocalOptional
data.value: MQTT接続を設定；デフォルトはローカル、オプション

data.value: エクスポートはCIEファイルのみサポートされます

data.value: データベースをリセットしますか?

data.value: キャリブレーション前に対応する物理カメラを設定してください

data.value: エクスポートファイルの場所を選択

data.value: データベースのみをクリアする

data.value: ローカルファイルを削除

data.name: EditFilterWheelConfig
data.value: フィルターホイール設定を編集

data.name: VoltageSourceUnit_V_CurrentSourceUnit_mA
data.value: Voltage source is measured in volts (V), current source in mA.

data.name: SourceMeterProtectionLimit_VoltageUnitV_CurrentUnitmA
data.value: Limits for source protection; voltage source unit: V; current source unit: mA.

data.name: TrueIsVoltageSource_FalseIsCurrentSource
data.value: `true` indicates a voltage source, `false` indicates a current source.

data.name: RegistryCenterNotConnected
data.value: The registration center is not connected.

data.name: TokenEmpty_RefreshingToken_PleaseRetry
data.value: The token is empty. Refreshing the token, please try again.

data.name: WorkflowStartNodeNotFound_RunFailed
data.value: The process startup node could not be found, and the process failed to run.

data.name: ExportLicense
data.value: ライセンスをエクスポート

data.value: ライセンスをファイルにエクスポート

data.value: ライセンスがクリップボードにコピーされました。

data.name: NoLicenseAvailable
data.value: 利用可能なライセンスがありません

data.name: LicenseExportedSuccessfully
data.value: ライセンスが正常にエクスポートされました

data.name: CopyLicenseFailed
data.value: ライセンスのコピーに失敗

data.value: ライセンスのエクスポートに失敗

data.name: FindCross
data.value: クロスポジショニング

data.name: SelectTemplateToViewDetails
data.value: Select a template to view details

data.name: PleaseSelectTemplateToViewAndEdit
data.value: Please select a template to view and edit.

data.name: AvoidDeletionUnlessNecessary
data.value: Do not delete unless necessary. Delete?

data.name: NotInstalled
data.value: インストールされていません

data.name: AlgorithmVisibilitySettings
data.value: アルゴリズム表示設定

data.name: FileOutputTemplate
data.value: ファイル出力テンプレート

data.value: パラメータテンプレート

data.name: BrightSpotCheck
data.value: 明るいスポットチェック

data.name: BlackScreenCheck
data.value: ブラックスクリーンチェック

data.name: ServiceLogAlgorithm
data.value: アルゴリズムサービスログ

data.name: ServiceLogSpectrum
data.value: スペクトルサービスログ

data.name: AvoidCreationUnlessNecessary
data.value: Please do not create a new service unless necessary

data.name: AvoidDeletionOfServiceUnlessNecessary
data.value: Do not delete services unless necessary

data.name: DeviceIdentifierAlreadyExists
data.value: デバイス識別子はすでに存在します

data.name: CreationSuccessRestartingService
data.value: 作成成功、サービスを再起動中

data.name: CreationFailedDatabaseInsertFailed
data.value: Creation failed, database insert failed, please contact the developer

data.name: UnsupportedDeviceTypeCreation
data.value: Creating {0} type device is not supported yet

data.name: AddPhysicalCameraFailed
data.value: 物理カメラの追加に失敗しました

data.name: AddPhysicalCameraSuccess
data.value: 物理カメラが正常に追加されました

data.name: AutoExposureParamSettings
data.value: 自動露光パラメータ設定

data.name: AutoExposureTimeoutCheckLog
data.value: Auto exposure timeout, check service log

data.name: AutoFocusTest
data.value: オートフォーカステスト

data.name: BatchNumberCannotBeEmpty
data.value: Batch number cannot be empty, enter first

data.name: BatchNumberEmpty
data.value: Batch number cannot be empty, enter first

data.name: ButtonCalibrationEdit
data.value: キャリブレーション編集

data.name: ButtonCalibrationManual
data.value: キャリブレーションマニュアル

data.name: ButtonFilterWheelConfig
data.value: フィルターホイール設定

data.name: ButtonGoToCameraManager
data.value: カメラマネージャーへ移動

data.name: ButtonOnlineDownloadLicense
data.value: ライセンスをオンラインでダウンロード

data.name: ButtonResetChannel
data.value: チャンネルをリセット

data.name: ButtonScanOnlineCameras
data.value: オンラインカメラをスキャン

data.name: ButtonSuppressWarning
data.value: この警告を今後表示しない

data.name: ButtonUploadCalibrationFile
data.value: キャリブレーションファイルをアップロード

data.name: CaliEditToolTipAngleShift
data.value: Color difference correction (AngleShift): variant of ColorDiff, for angle-dependent color difference correction

data.name: CaliEditToolTipColorDiff
data.value: Color difference correction (ColorDiff): corrects color difference shift between channels

data.name: CaliEditToolTipColorDiffShort
data.value: Eliminates color difference shift between channels

data.name: CaliEditToolTipColorShift
data.value: Color Shift correction (ColorShift): inter-channel spatial shift compensation Algorithm: Sub-pixel channel shift via OpenCV affine transform Configuration: JSON format (fillOffset and offset/offsets parameters)

data.name: CaliEditToolTipColorShiftShort
data.value: Compensates spatial shift between color channels in multi-channel optical systems

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDSNU
data.value: DSNU correction (Dark Signal Non-Uniformity): dark signal non-uniformity compensation Algorithm: pixel_out = max(pixel_in - DSNU_ref, 0) Configuration: Binary format (V0/V1 header + ushort dark frame reference data)

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDSNUShort
data.value: Dark signal non-uniformity compensation, eliminates pixel-level dark current differences via pre-acquired dark frame subtraction

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDarkNoise
data.value: Dark current correction (DarkNoise): eliminate sensor dark current noise under no-illumination conditions Algorithm: pixel_out = pixel_in × DarkNoiseRatio Configuration: JSON format (bpp and DarkNoiseRatio)

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDarkNoiseShort
data.value: Eliminates inherent sensor dark current signal via pre-calibrated ratio per-pixel compensation

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDefectPoint
data.value: Defect point correction (DefectPoint): detect and repair defective pixels Algorithm: Replace pre-calibrated defect coordinates using 7×7 neighborhood median filter Configuration: Binary format (4-byte defect count + coordinate list)

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDefectPointShort
data.value: Detects and interpolates defective pixels, 7x7 neighborhood median filter

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDistortion
data.value: Distortion correction (Distortion): lens radial/tangential distortion correction Algorithm: Supports standard pinhole model (k1,k2,p1,p2,k3) and fisheye model Configuration: JSON format (camera intrinsic matrix fx,fy,cx,cy and distortion coefficients)

data.name: CaliEditToolTipDistortionShort
data.value: Corrects lens distortion using OpenCV camera calibration model, supports standard pinhole and fisheye models

data.name: CaliEditToolTipFourColor
data.value: Four-color correction (LumFourColor): 3×3 matrix (9 coefficients a-i) Algorithm: [X,Y,Z] = 3×3 matrix × [R,G,B] (each channel normalized by Texp/Gain) Configuration: JSON format (9 coefficients a-i) Higher accuracy than single-color correction

data.name: CaliEditToolTipFourColorShort
data.value: 3x3 matrix full channel mixing, higher accuracy than single color

data.name: CaliEditToolTipLineArity
data.value: Linearity correction (LineArity): correct non-linear response characteristics of sensor Ensures output grayscale values are linear with actual light intensity

data.name: CaliEditToolTipLineArityShort
data.value: Corrects non-linear relationship between sensor output grayscale and actual light intensity

data.name: CaliEditToolTipLuminance
data.value: Luminance correction (Luminance): linear conversion from grayscale to absolute luminance Lv(cd/m²) Algorithm: Lv = (a / Texp) × pixel Configuration: JSON format (bpp, exposure time, and coefficients a,b,c,d) Output: Single-channel 32-bit floating point luminance map

data.name: CaliEditToolTipLuminanceShort
data.value: Lv = (a / Texp) x pixel, outputs single-channel luminance value only

data.name: CaliEditToolTipMultiColor
data.value: Multi-color correction (LumMultiColor): dynamic N/3×3 coefficient matrix Algorithm: Supports higher-order color conversion fitting, dynamic coefficient array length Configuration: JSON format (dynamic coefficients and gain array) Suitable for scenarios requiring higher accuracy

data.name: CaliEditToolTipMultiColorShort
data.value: Dynamic size coefficient matrix, supports higher-order color fitting

data.name: CaliEditToolTipOneColor
data.value: Single-color correction (LumOneColor): 4-coefficient linear model Algorithm: X = aR+dB, Y = bG, Z = cB (normalized by exposure/gain) Configuration: JSON format (a,b,c,d coefficients and Texp/Gain) Supports multi-threaded acceleration

data.name: CaliEditToolTipUniformity
data.value: Uniformity correction (Uniformity): compensate for lens vignetting and sensor sensitivity spatial variation Algorithm: pixel_out = pixel_in × Uniformity_factor Configuration: Binary format (V0/V1 header + float factor matrix)

data.name: CaliEditToolTipUniformityShort
data.value: Compensates lens vignetting and sensor response non-uniformity using pre-calibrated multiplication factor matrix

data.name: CalibrationFileNotConfiguredWithTemplate
data.value: Using {0} template, confirm calibration file configured

data.name: CalibrationServiceRequiredForTemplate
data.value: キャリブレーションテンプレートにはキャリブレーションサービスが必要です

data.name: CalibrationTemplate
data.value: キャリブレーションテンプレート

data.name: CameraGetDataReturnedEmpty
data.value: カメラGetDataが空を返しました

data.name: CameraParamSettings
data.value: カメラパラメータ設定

data.name: CannotCreateCameraWithoutCode
data.value: コードなしでカメラを作成できません

data.name: CaptureTimeoutConfigureCalibration
data.value: Capture timeout, configure calibration for physical camera?

data.name: ChannelParamSettings
data.value: チャンネルパラメータ設定

data.name: CheckBoxDoNotShowAgain
data.value: Do not show this warning again

data.name: ClearDatabaseItems
data.value: データベース関連項目をクリアしますか？

data.name: CloseCameraTimeoutCheckLog
data.value: カメラクローズタイムアウト、ログを確認してください

data.name: CloseLocalVideo
data.value: ローカルビデオを閉じる

data.name: CloseSMU
data.value: ソースメーターを閉じる

data.name: CloseSourceMeter
data.value: ソースメーターを閉じる

data.name: CloseWindowInSeconds
data.value: 1秒後にウィンドウを閉じる

data.name: ConfigureAssociatedDllFirst
data.value: まず関連するDLLを設定してください

data.name: DatabaseResetFailed
data.value: リセットできません。データベース設定を確認してください

data.name: DbCreateTemplateFailed
data.value: データベース{0}テンプレート作成失敗

data.name: DescriptionBasicPipeline
data.value: Calibration pipeline: Raw Image → Dark Current → Defect Point → DSNU → Uniformity → Color Shift → Distortion → Corrected Image

data.name: DescriptionBindNDNote
data.value: Uses device list for binding, not serial port parameters directly.

data.name: DescriptionCFWChannelMapping
data.value: Each column corresponds to an image channel, each row to a filter wheel port position.

data.name: DescriptionCFWDisableNote
data.value: Channel mapping will be cleared on save when disabled.

data.name: DescriptionCFWEnableNote
data.value: Configure serial port, wheel count and channel position mapping when enabled.

data.name: DescriptionCalibrationControl
data.value: Select calibration group then check calibration files for current camera processing chain.

data.name: DescriptionCalibrationEdit
data.value: Maintain camera calibration groups, upload calibration files, and select calibration resources for current group.

data.name: DescriptionCameraListSort
data.value: Sort by device status, prioritize online cameras

data.name: DescriptionColorCalibration
data.value: Convert sensor grayscale/RGB to CIE XYZ tristimulus or absolute luminance Lv(cd/m²), four mutually exclusive modes below

data.name: DescriptionCreateDevice
data.value: Complete basic parameters and filter wheel configuration after selecting camera to register.

data.name: DescriptionCreateUnregistered
data.value: Create unregistered cameras using the action column.

data.name: DescriptionSelectCamera
data.value: Select a physical camera from the left to view details and management operations

data.name: DescriptionSelectCameraType
data.value: Select camera model for online search

data.name: DescriptionSerialPortNote
data.value: Shows serial port and baud rate when no ND device is bound.

data.name: EnterValidCurrent
data.value: 有効な電流値を入力してください。

data.name: EnterValidVoltage
data.value: 有効な電圧値を入力してください。

data.name: FileCopyServiceRestartHint
data.value: You need to manually restart the service and copy the original folder to the new folder, otherwise it won't take effect. If you haven't copied the files, please reset the calibration files

data.name: FileDeletionPermanent
data.value: ファイル削除は元に戻せません

data.name: FileServiceCleanupComplete
data.value: ファイルサービスクリーンアップ完了

data.name: GetCameraIdMd5Failed
data.value: Failed to get camera ID MD5

data.name: HeaderBasicCalibrationPipeline
data.value: 基本キャリブレーション（順番に実行）

data.name: HeaderColorCalibrationMutual
data.value: カラーキャリブレーション（4つから1つ選択、相互排他）

data.name: HelpCalibrationSystemDesc
data.value: This system provides a complete calibration pipeline from raw image acquisition to CIE color space (XYZ/xy/uv/CCT) conversion

data.name: HelpChromaticParamsLabel
data.value: サポートされる色度パラメータ:

data.name: HelpColorCalibrationTip
data.value: ヒント: カラーキャリブレーションモードは相互排他です。1つ選択すると他の3つは解除されます。

data.name: HelpColorDiffDesc
data.value: Principle: Corrects color difference shift between channels, eliminates inter-channel color errors from optical system.

data.name: HelpColorShiftDesc
data.value: Principle: In multi-channel optical systems, different color channels may have spatial shifts. Channel-level shift compensation via OpenCV affine transform.

data.name: HelpDSNUDesc
data.value: Principle: DSNU is inherent pixel-level dark current variation. Compensated by per-pixel subtraction using pre-acquired dark frame reference.

data.name: HelpDarkNoiseDesc
data.value: Principle: Sensors produce dark current without illumination. Eliminates dark current noise by per-pixel multiplication using pre-calibrated ratio.

data.name: HelpDarkNoiseNote
data.value: Note: Per-pixel multiplication by dark current coefficient in ROI, overflow truncated to max.

data.name: HelpDefectPointDesc
data.value: Principle: Pre-calibrated defective pixel list, each replaced by 7x7 neighborhood median. Multi-channel independent processing.

data.name: HelpDistortionDesc
data.value: Principle: Uses OpenCV camera calibration, supports pinhole and fisheye models. Pre-computes remap table then executes via cv::remap.

data.name: HelpEngineFooter
data.value: -- Based on C++ DLL Calibration Engine (CVCommCore.dll) --

data.name: HelpFileFormatColorShift
data.value: Unified offset: { "fillOffset": true, "offset": { "X": 2, "Y": -1 } } Multi-channel independent offset: { "fillOffset": false, "offsets": [{"X":1,"Y":0}, {"X":0,"Y":-1}, ...] }

data.name: HelpFileFormatDSNU
data.value: V0：[8バイトヘッダー：height, width] + [ushortデータ：height × width] V1：[20バイトヘッダー：height, width, databpp, channels, typebpp] + [ushortデータ：height × width × channels]

data.name: HelpFileFormatDefectPoint
data.value: [4 bytes: defect count N] [4 bytes: y coordinate][4 bytes: x coordinate] × N

data.name: HelpFileFormatUniformity
data.value: V0：[8バイトヘッダー：height, width] + [floatデータ：height × width] V1：[20バイトヘッダー：height, width, databpp, channels, typebpp] + [floatデータ：height × width × channels]

data.name: HelpFilterDesc
data.value: Filtering: supports threshold, out-of-region, XYZ channel, percentage filtering and other anomaly pixel exclusion mechanisms.

data.name: HelpFormulaChromatic
data.value: CIE xy chromaticity: x = X/(X+Y+Z), y = Y/(X+Y+Z) CIE u'v' chromaticity: u' = 4X/(X+15Y+3Z), v' = 9Y/(X+15Y+3Z) CCT (Correlated Color Temperature) and Dominant Wavelength

data.name: HelpFormulaColorShift
data.value:
Construct 2×3 affine transform matrix: M = | 1 0 dx | | 0 1 dy |
call cv::warpAffine to execute sub-pixel shift When fillOffset=true, fill shifted blank area with edge mirror data

data.name: HelpFormulaDSNU
data.value:
pixel_out = max(pixel_in - DSNU_ref[i], 0)
Supports single and multi-channel (R/G/B subtract corresponding channel DSNU reference) Underflow truncated to 0

data.name: HelpFormulaDefectPoint
data.value:
1. Read defect list (row, col) 2. For each defect, take neighborhood pixels within center ±3 range 3. Sort neighborhood pixels, take median as repair value 4. Multi-channel independent processing
Median filter window: 7×7, boundary auto-cropped to image boundary

data.name: HelpFormulaDistortion
data.value:
1. Load calibration parameters (fx, fy, cx, cy, k1-k3, p1-p2) 2. Background thread pre-computes remap table: Standard model → cv::initUndistortRectifyMap Fisheye model → cv::fisheye::initUndistortRectifyMap 3. Use cv::remap for pixel remapping during calibration 4. alpha parameter controls scaling (0=no black border, 1=keep all pixels)
Distortion model: Standard: k1, k2, p1, p2, k3 (radial + tangential) Fisheye: 4 distortion coefficients

data.name: HelpFormulaFourColor
data.value:
| X | | a/(Tx·Gx) b/(Ty·Gy) c/(Tz·Gz) | | R | | Y | = | d/(Tx·Gx) e/(Ty·Gy) f/(Tz·Gz) | × | G | | Z | | g/(Tx·Gx) h/(Ty·Gy) i/(Tz·Gz) | | B |
Configuration file contains 9 coefficients a-i, plus each channel exposure time and gain Also supports multi-threaded parallel calculation

data.name: HelpFormulaLuminance
data.value:
Lv[i] = (a / Texp) × pixel[i]
Linear conversion, coefficient a normalized by exposure time Only processes valid pixels outside optical black area (OB) Output: Single-channel 32-bit floating point luminance map (cd/m²)

data.name: HelpFormulaMultiColor
data.value:
Coefficient array pa[N], gain array Gain[N/3] Every 3 coefficients form a group (pa[3k], pa[3k+1], pa[3k+2]): output[k] = pa[3k]×R + pa[3k+1]×G + pa[3k+2]×B
Suitable for special optical systems requiring higher accuracy

data.name: HelpFormulaOneColor
data.value:
X[i] = (a / Tx·Gx) × R[i] + (d / Tz·Gz) × B[i] Y[i] = (b / Ty·Gy) × G[i] Z[i] = (c / Tz·Gz) × B[i]
Where Tx/Ty/Tz = each channel exposure time, Gx/Gy/Gz = each channel gain Supports BGR interleaved and channel-separated input layouts Multi-threaded acceleration: image divided into 4 thread blocks by row for parallel calculation Output: 3 channels of 32-bit float [CIE_X][CIE_Y][CIE_Z]

data.name: HelpFormulaUniformity
data.value:
pixel_out = min(pixel_in × Uniformity_factor[i], MaxValue)
Overflow truncated to max (8-bit: 255, 16-bit: 65535) Supports single channel and RGB three-channel independent correction Supports BGR interleaved and channel-separated memory layouts

data.name: HelpFourColorDesc
data.value: Principle: Uses full 3x3 matrix (9 coefficients a-i) for channel mixing color conversion. Each output channel is weighted sum of all 3 input channels, higher accuracy than single color.

data.name: HelpIndicatorChecked
data.value: ● Checkbox (checked): enables this calibration step, applied during calibration execution

data.name: HelpIndicatorGray
data.value: ● Gray indicator (off): calibration file not found or invalid, step will be skipped

data.name: HelpIndicatorGreen
data.value: ● Green indicator (on): calibration file ready, file exists on server and available

data.name: HelpIndicatorUnchecked
data.value: ● Checkbox (unchecked): disables this calibration step, not applied even if file exists

data.name: HelpLineArityDesc
data.value: Principle: Corrects non-linear response between sensor output grayscale and actual light intensity, ensuring linear mapping.

data.name: HelpLuminanceDesc
data.value: Principle: Converts single-channel grayscale to absolute luminance Lv (cd/m²), outputs 32-bit float CIE-Y channel.

data.name: HelpMultiColorDesc
data.value: Principle: Uses dynamic-size coefficient matrix (N coefficients), supports higher-order color conversion. Coefficient array length N, gain array length N/3, linear combination of RGB per 3-coefficient group.

data.name: HelpOneColorDesc
data.value: Principle: Uses 4-coefficient model to convert 3-channel (RGB) grayscale to CIE XYZ tristimulus. Assumes X from R+B linear combination, Y from G only, Z from B only.

data.name: HelpSection1Desc
data.value: Calibration executes in fixed order below. Each step output feeds next step input, skipping disabled steps.

data.name: HelpSection3Desc
data.value: Four color calibration modes are mutually exclusive, only one enabled at a time. They convert sensor grayscale/RGB to CIE XYZ tristimulus or absolute luminance.

data.name: HelpSection3Title
data.value: 3. Color Calibration Details (choose one of four, mutually exclusive)

data.name: HelpSection4Desc
data.value: After calibration, chromaticity data can be extracted from CIE XYZ float image. Supports circular and rectangular ROI regions.

data.name: HelpUniformityDesc
data.value: Principle: Compensates lens vignetting and sensor sensitivity spatial variation. Uses pre-calibrated multiplication factor matrix, multiplying each pixel by corresponding correction coefficient.

data.name: ImageFileCannotBeEmpty
data.value: 画像ファイルは空にできません。まず画像を選択してください

data.name: ImageFileEmpty
data.value: Image file cannot be empty, select image first

data.name: InvalidSerialPort
data.value:
Serial port name {0} invalid or does not exist.
Please check serial port settings.

data.name: InvalidSerialPortTitle
data.value: 無効なシリアルポート

data.name: Keithley2450MaxCurrent100mA
data.value: Keithley 2450: when output voltage >20V, max output current is 100mA. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: Keithley2450MaxCurrent1A
data.value: Keithley 2450: when output voltage <20V, max output current is 1A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: Keithley2450MaxVoltage200V
data.value: Keithley 2450: max output voltage is 200V. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: Keithley2600MaxCurrent1A
data.value: Keithley 2600: when output voltage >6V, max output current is 1A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: Keithley2600MaxCurrent3A
data.value: Keithley 2600: when output voltage <6V, max output current is 3A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: Keithley2600MaxVoltage40V
data.value: Keithley 2600: max output voltage is 40V. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: LabelBasicCalibration
data.value: 基本キャリブレーション

data.name: LabelBindNDHint
data.value: Uses device list for binding, not serial port parameters directly.

data.name: LabelCFWDisabledSaveHint
data.value: Channel mapping will be cleared on save when disabled.

data.name: LabelCFWMatrixHint
data.value: Each column corresponds to an image channel, each row to a filter wheel port position.

data.name: LabelCalibrationEditHint
data.value: Maintain camera calibration groups, upload calibration files, and select calibration resources for current group.

data.name: LabelCalibrationGroupHint
data.value: Select calibration group then check calibration files for current camera processing chain.

data.name: LabelCalibrationHelpDesc
data.value: This system provides a complete calibration pipeline from raw image acquisition to CIE color space (XYZ/xy/uv/CCT) conversion

data.name: LabelCalibrationPipelineHint
data.value: Calibration pipeline: Raw Image → Dark Current → Defect Point → DSNU → Uniformity → Color Shift → Distortion → Corrected Image

data.name: LabelCameraListHint
data.value: Sort by device status, prioritize online cameras

data.name: LabelColorCalibrationDesc
data.value: Convert sensor grayscale/RGB to CIE XYZ tristimulus or absolute luminance Lv(cd/m²), four mutually exclusive modes below

data.name: LabelColorCalibrationHeader
data.value: Color Calibration (choose one of four, mutually exclusive)

data.name: LabelCreateDeviceHint
data.value: Complete basic parameters and filter wheel configuration after selecting camera to register.

data.name: LabelEnableCFWSerialHint
data.value: Configure serial port, wheel count and channel position mapping when enabled.

data.name: LabelEnterValidCurrent
data.value: Please enter a valid current value.

data.name: LabelEnterValidVoltage
data.value: Please enter a valid voltage value.

data.name: LabelFilterWheelCount
data.value: フィルターホイール数

data.name: LabelSelectCameraHint
data.value: Select a physical camera from the left to view details and management operations

data.name: LabelSerialPortHint
data.value: Shows serial port and baud rate when no ND device is bound.

data.name: LicenseAlertInvalid
data.value: License status is abnormal. Please check the license content.

data.name: LicenseAlertNoLicense
data.value: No license detected. Please import or apply for a license.

data.name: LicenseExportedByAdmin
data.value: License file exported successfully with admin privileges!

data.name: LicenseNotSupportedForCamera
data.value: This camera does not support this license

data.name: LocalPortOpenFailedInVideoMode
data.value: Local port open failed in video mode

data.name: MixedCameraLicensesSummary
data.value: Detected {0} expired and {1} expiring camera license(s)

data.name: NoCalibrationTypeSpecified
data.value: No calibration type specified for upload

data.name: NoUncreatedCameraFound
data.value: No uncreated camera found, please connect a camera and try again

data.name: PleaseConfigureDllFirst
data.value: Please configure the associated DLL first

data.name: PreciseS100MaxCurrent1A
data.value: Precise S100: when output voltage <30V, max output current is 1A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: PreciseS100MaxVoltage30V
data.value: Precise S100: max output voltage is 30V. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUKeithley2450MaxCurrentAboveThreshold
data.value: Keithley 2450: when output voltage >20V, max output current is 100mA. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUKeithley2450MaxCurrentBelowThreshold
data.value: Keithley 2450: when output voltage <20V, max output current is 1A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUKeithley2450MaxVoltage
data.value: Keithley 2450: max output voltage is 200V. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUKeithley2600MaxCurrentAboveThreshold
data.value: Keithley 2600: when output voltage >6V, max output current is 1A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUKeithley2600MaxCurrentBelowThreshold
data.value: Keithley 2600: when output voltage <6V, max output current is 3A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUKeithley2600MaxVoltage
data.value: Keithley 2600: max output voltage is 40V. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUPreciseS100MaxCurrentBelowThreshold
data.value: Precise S100: when output voltage <30V, max output current is 1A. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SMUPreciseS100MaxVoltage
data.value: Precise S100: max output voltage is 30V. Please adjust measurement parameters and retry!

data.name: SectionBasicCalibration
data.value: 基本キャリブレーション

data.name: SelectCameraModelForSearch
data.value: Select camera model for online search

data.name: SerialPortError
data.value:
Serial port {0} cannot be opened.
Exception: {1}

data.name: SerialPortException
data.value:
Serial port {0} cannot be opened.
Exception: {1}

data.name: SerialPortOccupied
data.value:
Serial port {0} is occupied by another program.
Please close camera or other programs using this serial port, or check device connection.

data.name: ServiceNotInstalled
data.value: RegistrationCenterService not detected, please confirm correct installation.

data.name: StartupServiceFailed
data.value: Failed to start RegistrationCenterService with administrator privileges.

data.name: TemplateCalibrationFileRequired
data.value: Using {0} template, confirm calibration file configured

data.name: TemplateFileNotExist
data.value: Using {0} template, {1} file does not exist

data.name: ToolTipAngleShift
data.value: Color correction (AngleShift): variant of ColorDiff, for angle-dependent color difference correction

data.name: ToolTipCalibrationHelpDetail
data.value: Open calibration system reference manual, view algorithm principles and configuration instructions for each calibration step

data.name: ToolTipColorDiff
data.value: Color correction (ColorDiff): corrects color difference between channels

data.name: ToolTipColorShift
data.value: Color shift correction (ColorShift): inter-channel spatial shift compensation. Configuration: JSON format (fillOffset and offset parameters)

data.name: ToolTipDSNU
data.value: DSNU correction (Dark Signal Non-Uniformity): dark signal non-uniformity compensation. Configuration: Binary format (V0/V1 header + ushort data)

data.name: ToolTipDarkNoise
data.value: Dark current correction (DarkNoise): eliminate sensor dark current noise. Configuration: JSON format (bpp and DarkNoiseRatio)

data.name: ToolTipDefectPoint
data.value: Defect point correction (DefectPoint): detect and repair defective pixels. Configuration: Binary format (defect count + coordinate list)

data.name: ToolTipDistortion
data.value: Distortion correction (Distortion): lens radial/tangential distortion correction. Configuration: JSON format (camera intrinsic matrix and distortion coefficients)

data.name: ToolTipFourColor
data.value: Four-color correction (LumFourColor): 3×3 matrix full channel mixing color conversion.

data.name: ToolTipLineArity
data.value: Linearity correction (LineArity): corrects non-linear sensor response characteristics

data.name: ToolTipLuminance
data.value: Luminance correction (Luminance): linear conversion from grayscale to absolute luminance Lv(cd/m²). Configuration: JSON format (bpp, exposure time, coefficient a)

data.name: ToolTipMultiColor
data.value: Multi-color correction (LumMultiColor): dynamic size coefficient matrix, supports higher-order color conversion.

data.name: ToolTipOneColor
data.value: Single-color correction (LumOneColor): 4-coefficient model converts 3-channel grayscale to CIE XYZ tristimulus.

data.name: ToolTipUniformity
data.value: Uniformity correction (Uniformity): compensates lens vignetting and sensor response non-uniformity. Configuration: Binary format (V0/V1 header + float factor matrix)

data.name: UserCancelledOrElevationFailed
data.value: User cancelled the operation or elevation failed.

data.name: Flow_NoFlowParamSelected
data.value: No flow parameter selected, cannot save

data.name: Flow_TemplateNoFlowData
data.value: Selected template has no flow data

data.name: Flow_NodeAnalysis_NoDataToExport
data.value: No data to export, please load batch data first

data.name: Flow_NodeAnalysis_SelectAtLeastOneBatch
data.value: Please select at least one batch

data.name: Flow_NodeAnalysis_SelectAtLeastTwoBatches
data.value: Please select at least two batches to compare

data.name: Flow_MessageList_ConfirmClearAll
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all flow MQTT message records?

data.name: Flow_MeasureBatch_SelectToViewConfig
data.value: Select process type to view config

data.name: Flow_PreProcess_SelectProcessor
data.value: Select a pre-processor to view config

data.name: OpenCvSharpFixDllLocked
data.value:
DLL is locked and cannot be replaced. Please close ColorVision and try again.
Error details: {0}

data.name: OpenCvSharpFixSuccess
data.value: Fix patch installed. Please restart ColorVision for changes to take effect.

data.name: OpenCvSharpFixConfirmClose
data.value: Fix patch downloaded. ColorVision will close to install the patch and restart automatically. Continue?

data.name: Engine_Msg_ConfirmDeleteAllRecords
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all records in the database? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Engine_Msg_ConfirmResetDatabase
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset the database? The database file will be deleted and recreated. This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Engine_Msg_RestoreSuccessRestartRequired
data.value: Restore successful, service restart required to load resource files

data.name: Engine_Msg_LoadingResultTableStats
data.value: Failed to load result table stats: {0}

data.name: Engine_Msg_AllTablesCleared
data.value: All data tables have been cleared.

data.name: Engine_Msg_EnterValidKeepMonths
data.value: Please enter a retention period greater than 0 months

data.name: Engine_Msg_OnlyThreeChannelCvRaw
data.value: Only three-channel CVRAW files are supported for CIE calculation.

data.name: Engine_Msg_ResultOnlyYNoColorCoords
data.value: Current result only has Y, no color coordinates, cannot display on CIE chart.

data.name: Engine_Msg_SelectCalibrationFileFirst
data.value: Please select a camera calibration file first.

data.name: Engine_Msg_ImportFourColorCalFailed
data.value: Failed to import four-color calibration file.

data.name: Engine_Msg_FileReadFailedUnsupported
data.value: File read failed or unsupported format.

data.name: Engine_Msg_NotSingleChannelImage
data.value: Cannot extract: the file is not a single-channel image.

data.name: Engine_Msg_TiffReadFailed
data.value: File read failed or corrupted TIFF file.

data.name: Engine_PG_DeleteOlderThanDays
data.value: Only Delete Files Older Than N Days

data.name: Engine_PG_CameraDeviceNameDesc
data.value: Enter the camera device name to use

data.name: Engine_PG_SpectrumDeviceNameDesc
data.value: Enter the spectrometer device name to use

data.name: Engine_PG_WarningDaysDesc
data.value: Days before license expiry to start warning

data.name: Engine_Msg_NoCleanableResultTables
data.value: No cleanable result tables found. Please check database connection and table structure.

data.name: Engine_Msg_LoadResultTableStatsFailed
data.value: Failed to load result table stats

data.name: Engine_Msg_LoadResultTableStatsFailedDetail
data.value: Failed to load result table stats: {0}

data.name: Engine_Msg_AllResultTablesCleared
data.value: All result tables have been cleared.

data.name: Engine_Msg_FileReadFailedCorruptedTiff
data.value: File read failed or corrupted TIFF file.

data.name: NoAreaError
data.value: Execution will error when all three are False

data.name: AutoCreateGroupHint
data.value: Entering a non-existent group name will auto-create on save

data.name: AutoDetectKeyRegionsToolTip
data.value: Auto-detect glowing key areas in image and create POI

data.name: DefaultUseInitialMatrix
data.value: Default values use the initial matrix from the class.

data.name: MigrationBackup
data.value: Migration Database Backup (flows and resources only)

data.name: MysqlMovedToWindow
data.value: MySQL result table cleanup moved to standalone window...

data.name: ProcessOrderHint
data.value: (Multiple processes can be configured per flow template...)

data.name: SampleGroupPlaceholder
data.value: Select existing group or enter new one

data.name: SelectProcessToViewConfig
data.value: Select a process item to view config

data.name: ShowOnCieDiagramToolTip
data.value: Show current result point on CIE chromaticity diagram

data.name: UseDrawToAddLayoutArea
data.value: Use drawing to add layout area

data.name: MappingFile
data.value: マッピング ファイル

data.name: MvsLogViewerNotFound
data.value: MVS LogViewer not found at the expected location.

data.name: Flow_ExportFlowFilter
data.value: プロセスパッケージ (*.cvflow)|*.cvflow|STNファイル (*.stn)|*.stn

data.name: Flow_FlowNotStartedMessage
data.value: Flow could not start: validation may have failed, flow is already running, or no template is selected

data.name: Flow_ImportFlowFilter
data.value: プロセスファイル (*.cvflow;*.stn)|*.cvflow;*.stn|プロセスパッケージ (*.cvflow)|*.cvflow|STNファイル (*.stn)|*.stn

data.name: Flow_MeasureBatch_SelectProcessTypeToViewConfig
data.value: Select process type to view config

data.name: Flow_NoPathFromStartToEnd
data.value: Cannot find valid path from start node to end node

data.name: Flow_PreProcess_AllTemplates
data.value: すべてのテンプレート

data.name: Flow_PreProcess_SelectProcessorToViewConfig
data.value: Select a pre-processor to view config

data.name: SerialPortAvailableDetail
data.value: Port is idle and ready to connect

data.name: SerialPortOccupiedDetail
data.value: Port is already in use by another program (Unauthorized Access)
